summary: Completed frontend testing of Iteration 19 features: Consolidated member list actions, View Member dialog with Profile/Actions tabs, Simulation dropdown, and Deposit/Withdrawal page. All 7 requested features are working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Delete button visibility check uses `isSuperAdmin` as boolean instead of function call `isSuperAdmin()`. Since isSuperAdmin is a function reference (truthy), Delete button shows for ALL admins, not just super admins.

passed_tests: TEST 1: Simulation dropdown has 5 options (Member View, Basic Admin View, Super Admin View, Honorary Licensee View, Extended Licensee View) ✓
TEST 2: Sidebar shows 'Deposit/Withdrawal' link (renamed from 'Licensee Account') ✓
TEST 3: Members table has 4 action buttons (View, Password Reset, Suspend, Delete) ✓
TEST 4: View Member Dialog has 4 tabs (Profile, Statistics, Activity, Actions) ✓
TEST 5: Profile tab has Edit button that enables inline editing ✓
TEST 6: Actions tab has Simulate, Manage License, Upgrade options ✓
TEST 7: Deposit/Withdrawal page shows 'Licensed Account Required' for master admin (non-licensee) ✓
TEST 8: Profile tab inline editing works with editable Full Name, Timezone, and Cancel/Save buttons ✓
TEST 9: License info displayed in Profile tab for licensed members ✓
TEST 10: Role check handles both 'member' and 'user' roles correctly in Actions tab ✓
action_items: FIX: AdminMembersPage.jsx line 551 - Change `{isSuperAdmin && (` to `{isSuperAdmin() && (` to properly restrict Delete button to super admins only
critical_code_review_comments: Role check correctly handles both 'member' and 'user' roles in Actions tab (lines 848, 874, 904)
Profile tab Edit functionality properly implemented with inline editing (lines 627-736)
Actions tab correctly shows Simulate, Manage License, Upgrade for regular members (lines 843-956)
License info displayed in Profile tab when member has license (lines 739-773)
Sidebar correctly renamed 'Licensee Account' to 'Deposit/Withdrawal' in Sidebar.jsx line 44
Simulation dropdown has all 5 options in Sidebar.jsx (lines 193-229)
BUG: isSuperAdmin used as boolean instead of function call at line 551
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 19 features are working: 1) Members table reduced to 4 actions (View, Password, Suspend, Delete), 2) View Member dialog has 4 tabs (Profile, Statistics, Activity, Actions), 3) Profile tab has Edit button for inline editing with Cancel/Save, 4) Actions tab has Simulate, Manage License, Upgrade buttons for regular members, 5) Role check handles both 'member' and 'user' values, 6) Simulation dropdown has 5 options, 7) Deposit/Withdrawal page shows 'Licensed Account Required' for non-licensees. ONE BUG FOUND: Delete button visibility uses isSuperAdmin as boolean instead of function call - needs fix.

members_table_4_actions.description: Table shows only 4 action buttons: View (Eye), Password Reset (Key), Suspend (Ban), Delete (Trash)

view_member_dialog_profile_tab.description: Profile tab with Edit button that enables inline editing of Full Name and Timezone

view_member_dialog_actions_tab.description: Actions tab with Simulate Member View, Manage License, and Upgrade Role options

license_info_in_profile.description: License info (type, starting amount, current amount) displayed in Profile tab for licensed members

simulation_dropdown_5_options.description: Shows 5 options: Member View, Basic Admin View, Super Admin View, Honorary Licensee View, Extended Licensee View

deposit_withdrawal_page.description: Shows 'Licensed Account Required' message for non-licensed users (master admin)

role_check_member_user.description: Role checks handle both 'member' and 'user' roles correctly

bugs_found.issue: isSuperAdmin used as boolean instead of function call
bugs_found.impact: Delete button shows for ALL admins instead of only super admins
